title: Bankroll Management for Sweepstakes Casinos: The Complete Guide
description: How to manage your Gold Coins and Sweepstakes Coins across multiple platforms for maximum free-play value. Includes tracking spreadsheets and optimization strategies.
author: Kevin

content.body: Bankroll management isn't just for real-money gambling. In sweepstakes casinos, managing your Gold Coins (GC) and Sweepstakes Coins (SC) efficiently is the difference between steady accumulation and wasting your free play.

content.heading: The Core Principle
content.body: Always play SC before GC. SC has real prize redemption potential — GC is just for fun. Never let SC sit unplayed while you're grinding GC for VIP points.

callout.text: SC often has wagering requirements before redemption. Play your SC on high-RTP games to clear wagering efficiently.

content.heading: Multi-Platform Allocation
content.body: I manage 22 accounts across 10+ platforms. Here's my allocation strategy:

content.heading: Tracking System
content.body: The Crown Bot dashboard tracks all of this automatically, but if you're doing it manually, a simple spreadsheet with these columns works:
list: Daily SC claimed and running streak
Cumulative SC balance and progress to redemption minimum
Last redemption date and processing time

content.heading: Redemption Strategy
content.body: Don't redeem at the minimum threshold every time. Larger redemptions often have better processing times and fewer verification hurdles. I aim for 3x the minimum before redeeming.
